name: stanford-learning-assessment-model
description: Thin installable MCPB bridge for the Stanford Learning Assessment Model (SLAM).
long_description: SLAM adds an instructor-configurable formative assessment layer to AI workflows. This MCPB package installs a local MCP bridge that authenticates a learner, forwards assessment interactions to the SLAM cloud, and returns cited student- and class-level insight.

tools.name: start_assessment
tools.description: Start a guided SLAM assessment session.

tools.name: next_prompt
tools.description: Retrieve the next configured assessment prompt.

tools.name: submit_response
tools.description: Submit a student response for the current prompt.

tools.name: record_confidence
tools.description: Record a learner confidence rating and rationale.

tools.name: submit_reflection
tools.description: Capture metacognitive reflection for the session.

tools.name: upload_artifact
tools.description: Attach a document or code artifact for analysis.

tools.name: end_assessment
tools.description: End the assessment and trigger formative reporting.
